patents.title: AI-Based Adaptive Intrusion Detection System for IoT Networks
patents.inventors: P. Chinnasamy, R. Kumar, S. Venkatesh
patents.description: A novel intrusion detection system using adaptive deep learning algorithms for real-time threat detection in IoT environments.

patents.title: Blockchain-Based Tamper-Proof Digital Evidence Management System
patents.description: A decentralized evidence management system leveraging blockchain technology for immutable storage and verification of digital forensic evidence.

patents.title: Quantum-Resistant Key Distribution Protocol for Smart Grid Networks
patents.inventors: P. Chinnasamy, D. Singh, K. Raghavan
patents.description: A post-quantum cryptographic key distribution protocol designed for securing communication in smart grid infrastructures.

patents.title: Privacy-Preserving Federated Learning Framework for Healthcare AI
patents.description: A framework that enables collaborative AI model training across healthcare institutions without sharing sensitive patient data.
